hero.subtitle: Send encrypted messages into the future. Letters to loved ones, important data, or a message to yourself, delivered exactly on time.

features.encryptionDescription: Only the recipient with the key can read the message. Not even we have access.
features.deliveryDescription: Schedule delivery for any date - a day, a year, or a decade from now.
features.controlDescription: Postpone delivery or get reminders before the message is sent.
